  "claims": [
    "The State Auditor found that the CSU Chancellor's Office did not do its due diligence to explore transportation options before investing in expensive parking facilities funded by increasing student fees.",
    "Campuses built expensive new parking structures resulting in increased parking permit fees for students and only minimal parking capacity.",
